calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia Dowling #5388.

Petitioner Michael Anthony Santos was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Robert Michael Alan.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-20-2011 Reset To Oct-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-01-2011 Reset To Sep-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellem Chaitan, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Brenda Fields, #7235.

Petitioner Brandon March'on Smith was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court requires additional information from petitioner in order to proceed with the proposed name change. Good cause appearing, this matter is CONTINUED to Tuesday, September 20, 2011 @ 9:00 a.m. for hearing on the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Jul-27-2011 Text Ruling
